response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership, extensive full-stack development experience, and a proven track record in architecture and team mentorship. His experience with open-source projects, performance optimization, and modern tech stacks is impressive. However, his German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and his recent roles have been in Brazil, raising questions about cultural fit and remote leadership experience in a German-speaking context.
strengths: Extensive experience in software architecture, design, and leadership across diverse tech stacks (Node.js, Python, DLang, etc.)
Strong background in open-source contributions and community-driven projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven track record in team mentorship, TDD, and modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: German language proficiency is basic (not meeting minimum C1 requirement)
Limited recent experience in German-speaking markets or projects
Lacks explicit mention of UML expertise, project management certifications, or security/compliance experience
